temporal_evidence.unit_evidence_statement: Legacy APB1da dt, ttime and exported .dat Time are in minutes.
legacy_source_observations: APB1da::saveFile writes the Time block from APB1da::ttime.
APB1da::Solve increments t with t += dt and appends t to ttime.
The legacy .dat output does not declare the physical unit of ttime.
The legacy time unit is resolved as minutes by direct author-provided context.
The migrated YAML declares total_time=12.5 min and dt=0.5 min, but the reduced modern CSV sample spans only the first 420 s.
temporal_evidence.classification_reason: The legacy time unit is resolved as minutes by author-provided context, but case and duration equivalence remain pending; numeric temporal comparison remains blocked except for explicit unit conversion.

evidence.statement: Legacy APB1da dt, ttime and exported .dat Time are in minutes.

field_mappings.notes: Legacy Time can be converted to seconds, but must not be compared numerically against modern time_s until case and duration equivalence are established.
Legacy Layer is not equivalent to modern wall_gp_* or any modern discretization index.
Legacy dP must not be assumed equivalent to modern net_pressure_Pa.
Fracture width is present in modern CSV but not available in the legacy dat fixture.
The SCORE-MRO-28 JSON fixture is useful for parser structure but is not a case-equivalent pressure comparison with BUZ67D modern LOT/PKN.
sigmaTheta is not exported by the legacy fixture and must not be compared in this phase.
pw is not exported by the legacy fixture and must not be compared in this phase.
margin is not exported by the legacy fixture and must not be compared in this phase.
opened is not exported by the legacy fixture and must not be compared in this phase.

caveats: Legacy temporal unit is minutes based on author_provided_context.
Legacy Time can be converted documentally with time_s = Time_raw * 60.0.
Legacy Time must not be compared numerically against modern time_s until case and duration equivalence are established.
The reduced legacy fixture spans 0..750 s after conversion, while the reduced modern fixture spans 0..420 s.
Legacy Layer is 1-based and is not equivalent to modern wall_gp_*.
Legacy dP must not be assumed equivalent to modern net_pressure_Pa.
sigmaTheta is not available for legacy-modern comparison.
pw is not available for legacy-modern comparison.
margin is not available for legacy-modern comparison.
opened is not available for legacy-modern comparison.
This phase is structural/documental only and performs no physical validation.
